title: AI Deployment Engineer- ChatGPT Ecosystem
company_focus:
AI research and deployment company creating general-purpose
AI for humanity
description:
About the team

The Technical Success team is responsible for ensuring the
safe and effective deployment of ChatGPT and OpenAI API
applications for developers and enterprises. We act as a
trusted advisor and thought partner for our customers,
ensuring developers and enterprises maximize value from our
models and products.

The AI Deployment Engineering team, part of Technical
Success, is focused on enabling high-impact and strategic
customers and partners. They collaborate closely to resolve
technical challenges, provide deep expertise, and co-build
innovative ecosystem experiences that highlight the broader
advantages of partnering with OpenAI.

About the role

We’re hiring a AI Deployment Engineer to help shape the next
generation of OpenAI’s partner ecosystem in ChatGPT across
applications and commerce. Acting as the dedicated technical
resource for strategic partners, you’ll drive solution
design and the co-development of innovative experiences that
highlight the full potential of our platform.

You’ll provide expert technical guidance while collaborating
with Partnerships, Product, Engineering, and GTM teams,
reporting into Technical Success.

This role is based in our SF or NYC office. We use a hybrid
work model of 3 days in the office per week and offer
relocation assistance to new employees.

In this role, you will:

- Deliver an exceptional partner experience by providing
  technical expertise, scoping use cases, and supporting the
  development of Apps in ChatGPT and commerce checkout
  experiences with technical stakeholders and strategic
  partners.
- Partner with our Partnerships team to design and support
  ecosystem integrations, ensuring technical feasibility and
  high-impact launches.
- Guide partners on best practices for leveraging the OpenAI
  API and ChatGPT to create secure, scalable, and
  differentiated experiences.
- Serve as the first line of defense for design, security,
  compliance, and architecture questions, escalating complex
  requirements to internal experts as needed.
- Create and maintain documentation, implementation guides,
  and FAQs for common partner requirements and technical
  challenges.
- Gather partner feedback and represent the voice of the
  ecosystem to internal teams, helping shape product
  roadmaps and future partner programs.

You’ll thrive in this role if you:

- Have 5+ years of experience in a technical, customer-facing
  role such as Solutions Engineer, Solutions Architect, or
  Partner Engineer.
- Demonstrate a strong understanding of and experience working
  with LLMs, MCP, REST APIs, Python, JavaScript, and front-
  end design and development experience
- Have experience supporting ecosystem or partner motions,
  including co-development or joint go-to-market programs.
- Are an exceptional communicator who can translate complex
  technical concepts to business stakeholders and
  executives.
- Operate with high horsepower, manage multiple projects
  simultaneously, and thrive in a fast-changing environment
  with evolving commercial structures.
- Bring a collaborative, humble attitude with an eagerness to
  help partners and internal teams succeed.

About OpenAI

OpenAI is an AI research and deployment company dedicated to
ensuring that general-purpose artificial intelligence
benefits all of humanity. We push the boundaries of the
capabilities of AI systems and seek to safely deploy them to
the world through our products. AI is an extremely powerful
tool that must be created with safety and human needs at its
core, and to achieve our mission, we must encompass and
value the many different perspectives, voices, and
experiences that form the full spectrum of humanity.

We are an equal opportunity employer, and we do not
discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national
origin, sex, sexual orientation, age, veteran status,
disability, genetic information, or other applicable legally
protected characteristic.

For additional information, please see OpenAI’s Affirmative
Action and Equal Employment Opportunity Policy Statement.

Background checks for applicants will be administered in
accordance with applicable law, and qualified applicants
with arrest or conviction records will be considered for
employment consistent with those laws, including the San
Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance, the Los Angeles County Fair
Chance Ordinance for Employers, and the California Fair
Chance Act, for US-based candidates. For unincorporated Los
Angeles County workers: we reasonably believe that criminal
history may have a direct, adverse and negative relationship
with the following job duties, potentially resulting in the
withdrawal of a conditional offer of employment: protect
computer hardware entrusted to you from theft, loss or
damage; return all computer hardware in your possession
(including the data contained therein) upon termination of
employment or end of assignment; and maintain the
confidentiality of proprietary, confidential, and non-public
information. In addition, job duties require access to
secure and protected information technology systems and
related data security obligations.

To notify OpenAI that you believe this job posting is non-
compliant, please submit a report through this form. No
response will be provided to inquiries unrelated to job
posting compliance.

We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations to
applicants with disabilities, and requests can be made via
this link.

OpenAI Global Applicant Privacy Policy

At OpenAI, we believe artificial intelligence has the
potential to help people solve immense global challenges,
and we want the upside of AI to be widely shared. Join us in
shaping the future of technology.

use_cases: Building and deploying ChatGPT applications within the OpenAI ecosystem
Integrating commerce checkout experiences with ChatGPT platform
Creating secure and scalable partner experiences using OpenAI API
Developing innovative ecosystem applications for strategic partners

ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves deploying and co-developing ChatGPT
applications with strategic partners, providing hands-on
technical guidance for building experiences that leverage
OpenAI's LLM APIs. The engineer acts as a Forward Deployed
Engineer who directly implements AI solutions, guides
partners on LLM integration best practices, and supports the
development of real-world AI applications, rather than just
building supporting infrastructure.
